items.title: Bitcoin Weakens as Oil-Price Spike Revives Inflation Concerns
items.desc: Bitcoin lost ground on Monday as oil prices spiked after the US launched fresh attacks on Iran, stoking concerns that higher energy costs could renew inflation pressures and dampen demand for riskier assets.

items.title: Oana Țoiu participates in the EU Foreign Affairs Council
items.desc: Foreign Minister Oana Țoiu is participating in the Foreign Affairs Council meeting in Brussels, where she will support Romania's position on security in the Black Sea, support for Ukraine and the situation in the Middle East.
